call_segments.speaker: agent
call_segments.text: Thank you for calling First National Bank, this is Sarah speaking. How can I help you today?

call_segments.speaker: customer
call_segments.text: Hi Sarah, I noticed two unauthorized charges on my checking account from last week. One for $247.50 and another for $89.99. I need to dispute these.

call_segments.speaker: agent
call_segments.text: I'm sorry to hear about that. Let me pull up your account right away. Can you confirm the last four digits of your account number?

call_segments.speaker: agent
call_segments.text: Thank you. I can see the two charges you mentioned. I'll initiate a dispute for both transactions right now. You should receive provisional credits within 2 business days.

call_segments.speaker: customer
call_segments.text: That's great, thank you. Also, should I get a new debit card in case the card number was compromised?

call_segments.speaker: agent
call_segments.text: That's a great question. Yes, I'd recommend we issue a replacement card. I'll cancel the current card and send a new one. It should arrive within 5-7 business days. In the meantime, you can use your digital wallet.

call_segments.speaker: customer
call_segments.text: Perfect. One more thing - can you also set up transaction alerts so I get notified for any charge over $50?

call_segments.speaker: agent
call_segments.text: Absolutely. I've set up SMS alerts for transactions over $50. You'll also receive email notifications. Is there anything else I can help with?

call_segments.speaker: customer
call_segments.text: No, that covers everything. You've been very helpful, Sarah. Thank you.

call_segments.speaker: agent
call_segments.text: You're welcome! Just to confirm - I've initiated disputes for both charges, ordered a replacement card, and set up transaction alerts. If you have any other concerns, don't hesitate to call back. Have a great day!
